docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY COLINDRES, ELMER DBA MY SOLUTIONS IN AS TO DEFENDANT TANWAR, VINEET ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-03-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ELMER COLINDRES. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT VINEET TANWAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: L. YOUNG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
